title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a new supermarket.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Have you tried the supermarket that opened near the cinema? || Man: Yes. It's smaller than I expected, and the car park was almost full. || Woman: Will you go again? || Man: Probably. [8]The best thing is that it stays open until ten, so I can shop after football practice[/8]. The prices are normal, but the late opening is useful. || Woman: Maybe you can tell me more about it tomorrow, when you've had time to think.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you tried the supermarket that opened near the cinema?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes. It's smaller than I expected, and the car park was almost full.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Will you go again?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Probably. The best thing is that it stays open until ten, so I can shop after football practice. The prices are normal, but the late opening is useful.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Maybe you can tell me more about it tomorrow, when you've had time to think.

questions.question: What does the man like about the supermarket?

options.C: It has a large car park.

questions.explanation: He says the best thing is that it stays open until ten.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman talking about a visit to the dentist.
extracts.audio_script: Man: How was your dentist appointment? || Woman: Fine. I was worried because I hadn't been for two years, but there was no serious problem. || Man: That's good. || Woman: Yes, although [9]I had to wait nearly half an hour after my appointment time, and I was late getting back to work[/9]. The dentist himself was very kind. || Man: Good point. I suppose it's one of those things you only understand after trying it yourself. || Woman: That sounds sensible. It's always easier when you know what to expect before you make a final decision.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: How was your dentist appointment?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Fine. I was worried because I hadn't been for two years, but there was no serious problem.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That's good.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, although I had to wait nearly half an hour after my appointment time, and I was late getting back to work. The dentist himself was very kind.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good point. I suppose it's one of those things you only understand after trying it yourself.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds sensible. It's always easier when you know what to expect before you make a final decision.

questions.question: What was the woman unhappy about?

options.B: She had to wait too long.

questions.explanation: She says she had to wait nearly half an hour after her appointment time.

extracts.context: You will hear two people talking about a painting class.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Did you enjoy the painting class? || Woman: Yes, but it was harder than I expected. We had to paint a landscape, and I usually draw people. || Man: Was the teacher helpful? || Woman: Very. [10]The difficulty was that we had to finish the picture in one lesson, so I rushed the last part[/10]. I'd prefer two shorter sessions. || Woman: That sounds sensible. It's always easier when you know what to expect before you make a final decision.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you enjoy the painting class?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, but it was harder than I expected. We had to paint a landscape, and I usually draw people.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Was the teacher helpful?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Very. The difficulty was that we had to finish the picture in one lesson, so I rushed the last part. I'd prefer two shorter sessions.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds sensible. It's always easier when you know what to expect before you make a final decision.

questions.question: What did the woman find difficult?

options.C: finishing the work in the time allowed

questions.explanation: She says she had to finish the picture in one lesson and rushed the last part.

extracts.context: You will hear a man telling a friend about a camping weekend.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Did the camping weekend go well? || Man: Mostly. The campsite was clean, and the lake was great for swimming. || Woman: Was it cold at night? || Man: Not really. [11]The only bad thing was the ground; it was so hard that I couldn't sleep comfortably[/11]. Next time I'll take a better mat. || Man: I see what you mean. Sometimes those small details matter more than people expect at first. || Woman: Well, I hope it works out, because it sounds as if you've thought about it carefully.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did the camping weekend go well?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Mostly. The campsite was clean, and the lake was great for swimming.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Was it cold at night?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not really. The only bad thing was the ground; it was so hard that I couldn't sleep comfortably. Next time I'll take a better mat.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I see what you mean. Sometimes those small details matter more than people expect at first.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Well, I hope it works out, because it sounds as if you've thought about it carefully.

questions.question: What did the man dislike about the camping weekend?
questions.explanation: He says the ground was so hard that he couldn't sleep comfortably.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a new art teacher.
extracts.audio_script: Man: What's your new art teacher like? || Woman: Very different from our last one. She doesn't talk for long at the front of the room. || Man: Is that good? || Woman: Yes. [12]She walks around while we work and gives each person advice about their own picture[/12]. It feels more useful than a general explanation. || Woman: Well, I hope it works out, because it sounds as if you've thought about it carefully. || Man: Anyway, let me know what happens, because I'm interested to hear how it goes next time.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What's your new art teacher like?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Very different from our last one. She doesn't talk for long at the front of the room.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Is that good?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes. She walks around while we work and gives each person advice about their own picture. It feels more useful than a general explanation.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Well, I hope it works out, because it sounds as if you've thought about it carefully.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Anyway, let me know what happens, because I'm interested to hear how it goes next time.

questions.question: What does the woman like about the teacher?
questions.explanation: The woman says the teacher gives each person advice about their own picture.

extracts.context: You will hear a man talking about volunteering at a festival.
extracts.audio_script: Speaker: I volunteered at the music festival last weekend. I expected to help at the entrance, checking tickets, but they asked me to work behind one of the food stalls instead. [13]It was much busier than I expected, and by lunchtime I was too tired to watch the bands I had wanted to see[/13]. Still, the other volunteers were great fun. || Speaker: I told a friend about it later, and she said she had experienced something very similar.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: I volunteered at the music festival last weekend. I expected to help at the entrance, checking tickets, but they asked me to work behind one of the food stalls instead. It was much busier than I expected, and by lunchtime I was too tired to watch the bands I had wanted to see. Still, the other volunteers were great fun.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: I told a friend about it later, and she said she had experienced something very similar.

questions.question: How did the man feel by lunchtime?

options.C: too tired to enjoy the music

questions.explanation: He says he was too tired to watch the bands he wanted to see.
